creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can someone check if AV1 decoding via (bundled) dav1d works fine?

1. Open https://www.youtube.com/testtube
2. Select "Always Prefer AV1"
3. Open https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLvndfuQ5JldKMffLOhQ6pLdO0euZfq_40
4. Play any video in the list
5. Select highest resolution that plays smoothly in a standalone player
6. Right click on video and select "Stats for nerds"
7. Confirm you're watching AV1 (av01.0.05M.08) content
